title: allium nevadense
intro: Allium nevadense, also known as Nevada onion or mountain onion, is a species of perennial plant in the Allium genus, native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Allium nevadense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and powdering the bulbs, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
